subcodes.title: Words to Mr. N. R. Vakil, spoken on 1914-04-18
subcodes.first_line: They contain many inspired utterances, but through the lapse of time human ideas have crept in and afterward men have come to believe that they are all, in their totality, the revealed words of God.
subcodes.subjects: @Judaism; the Torah; the Jewish people, @multiple meanings; interpretations in scripture, @corruption; misinterpretation of the Word of God
